steps.title: Identify the slope of the linear function
steps.content: The function $$w(t)=300-4t$$ is in the form $$w(t)=mt+b$$ where $$m$$ is the slope. Here the coefficient of $$t$$ is $$-4$$, so $$m=-4$$.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the draining rate
steps.content:
A negative slope means the volume decreases. The magnitude $$|m|=4$$ gives the volume lost per second. Thus the container drains $$4$$ milliliters each second.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
